headline: National Grid (LSE:NG) Is Putting $1.75 Billion Into U.S. Data Center Power
summary: National Grid (LSE:NG) is committing $1.75b for a major stake in Joulent LLC. The partnership focuses on delivering power solutions for large U.S. data centers and AI infrastructure. The plan includes a 2.67 GW power facility in Texas designed to support Microsoft's long-term energy needs. The deal expands National Grid's U.S. footprint and exposure to digital infrastructure demand. For investors watching National Grid, this move deepens the company's role in U.S. electricity infrastructure...

headline: Tokenmaxxing is out, but companies are still spending on AI. What's changed?
summary: In just a short amount of time, corporate policy on "tokenmaxxing" — or excessively using AI models to inflate usage on internal leaderboards — has already peaked and valleyed. After seeing their bill for AI tokens, many companies have shifted toward a more efficient outlook on AI spending. Tabs CEO Ali Hussain discusses what's changed within corporate AI pricing and what this pivot may mean for OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) and Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) ahead of their mega-IPOs.

content.title: Tokenmaxxing is out, but companies are still spending on AI. What's changed?
content.description:
In just a short amount of time, corporate policy on "tokenmaxxing" — or excessively using AI models to inflate usage on internal leaderboards — has already peaked and valleyed. After seeing their bill for AI tokens, many companies have shifted toward a more efficient outlook on AI spending.

Tabs CEO Ali Hussain discusses what's changed within corporate AI pricing and what this pivot may mean for OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) and Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) ahead of their mega-IPOs.
content.summary: In just a short amount of time, corporate policy on "tokenmaxxing" — or excessively using AI models to inflate usage on internal leaderboards — has already peaked and valleyed. After seeing their bill for AI tokens, many companies have shifted toward a more efficient outlook on AI spending. Tabs CEO Ali Hussain discusses what's changed within corporate AI pricing and what this pivot may mean for OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) and Anthropic (ANTH.PVT) ahead of their mega-IPOs.

headline: The Contracted Revenue Backlog Microsoft Stock Bears Keep Missing
summary: Microsoft (MSFT) stock has had a tough run, down 20% over the last year and trailing the market significantly. The question for skeptics is whether the demand for artificial intelligence is real enough to pay for it all.

headline: Microsoft (MSFT) Launches $2.5 Billion Frontier Company For Enterprise AI Adoption
summary: Microsoft has announced the launch of Microsoft Frontier Company with a planned investment of $2.5b. The new unit will embed 6,000 AI engineers and specialists directly with enterprise customers. The initiative aims to accelerate large scale AI adoption across industries in partnership with firms such as Accenture and KPMG. For investors tracking Microsoft, NasdaqGS:MSFT, this move represents a material expansion of its AI services effort rather than a routine product update. The stock last...
